summary_en: 43 ordinary shares (0.00% of issued shares) to be cancelled on 2026-07-15. Cancellation conditional on approval of stock split (effective 2026-07-16) at extraordinary shareholder meeting on 2026-06-24. Post-cancellation issued share count: 992,957 shares.
title_en: Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-28, キャリアバンク's board resolved to cancel 43 ordinary shares held in treasury pursuant to Companies Act Article 178. The shares represent 0.00% of issued shares as of 2026-05-14. Cancellation is scheduled for 2026-07-15 and is conditional upon shareholder approval of a stock split effective 2026-07-16 at the extraordinary shareholder meeting planned for 2026-06-24. Post-cancellation, issued share count will total 992,957 shares.
